command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup

echo "=== TEST 6 (fix): search sakura memory for 'memory' ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent sakura --op search \
  --query "memory"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 8 (fix): archive shared event ==="
python3 - << 'PYEOF2'
import sys, re
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, '/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_agent
from memory_runtime import archive_memory

files = sorted(Path('/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/memory/shared/events').glob('*.md'))
if not files:
    print("No shared event files found")
    sys.exit(0)

text = files[0].read_text('utf-8')
m = re.search(r'memory_id: (.+)', text)
if not m:
    print("No memory_id found in", files[0])
    sys.exit(0)

mid = m.group(1).strip()
print(f"Archiving: {mid}")
identity = load_agent('remy', repo_root=Path('/tmp/moreno-ai-setup'))
r = archive_memory(identity, 'shared', mid, subtype='events')
if r['success']:
    print(f"OK  audit={r['audit_id']}  archived_to={r['data']['archived_to']}")
else:
    print(f"FAIL: {r['error']}")
PYEOF2

echo ""
echo "=== AUDIT RECORDS (memory operations) ==="
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | grep -v "^sentinel-2026-06-16_0" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== SAMPLE AUDIT RECORD ==="
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/sentinel-2026-06-16_15*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 | \
  xargs python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); [print(k+':',v) for k,v in d.items() if k not in ['errors','warnings']]" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== SAMPLE MEMORY RECORD (sakura personal) ==="
head -15 agents/sakura/MEMORY.md

echo ""
echo "=== MEMORY FILES CREATED ==="
find memory/ agents/ -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".git" | grep -v "JOURNAL\|RELATIONSHIPS\|VOICE\|AVATAR\|SOUL\|MEMORY.md" | sort
echo "--- personal MEMORY.md files ---"
find agents/ -name "MEMORY.md" -newer /tmp/moreno-ai-setup/runtime/memory_runtime.py 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== VERIFY ARCHIVE ==="
ls memory/shared/events/archived/ 2>/dev/null || echo "archive dir not yet created"
